After a long black screen, it will display the Capcom crash report tool, and then will show you the system version, which freezes and cannot be interacted with. Game must be exited through the deck UI

title: MONSTER HUNTER RISE

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT (navi10, LLVM 14.0.6, DRM 3.48, 6.0.9-zen1-1-zen)
notes:
Monster Hunter Rise received its Title Update 3 today which is 24th November 2022. Whenever I launch the game. it prompts:

The server is not reachable. Check your Internet connection and click "Retry"

In case the problem persists, click "Next" to open the support website in the default browser.

Switched to Proton 7.0-4 and the problem still persist. Removed DXVK_ASYNC=1 and WINE_FULLSCREEN_FSR=1 and still the same result. Removed all commands except for gamemoderun %command% and still the same result.
